compiled_state.title: RED: Add promptfoo eval test case asserting re-invocation guard in implementation-plan skill
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Context
Story 2a2f-eacc: implementation-plan re-invocation guard. The skill currently has no guard against re-invocation when children exist. This RED eval task establishes the failing behavioral test.

## TDD Requirement (RED)
Modify plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml to add a test case:
- Scenario: implementation-plan is invoked on a story that already has 2 children: one closed task and one open task
- Expected: the skill output classifies the closed child as read-only (does NOT create a duplicate task for it) and includes language about a re-invocation guard or child classification
- Run: bash .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- This test case MUST FAIL (RED) against the current SKILL.md (which has no guard)

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] promptfooconfig.yaml contains a new test case for re-invocation with existing children
  Verify: grep -q "re-invocation\|reinvocation\|existing children\|closed.*child" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] New test case uses llm-rubric or similar assertion to check guard behavior
  Verify: grep -A5 "re-invocation\|reinvocation\|existing children" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml | grep -q "rubric\|assert\|contains"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0 (other tests still pass; new eval test is expected to fail and must be noted as RED in the test file or marked in .test-index)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py

comments.body: AC amendment: Eval scenario must include in-progress child alongside closed child. Rubric must assert: (a) closed child classified as read-only / not duplicated, (b) in-progress child appears in output as flagged item requiring review.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (none required — this task IS the test) ✓
comments.author: Test
